# init(url:name:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a texture that loads its texel data from a file at the specified URL.

## Declaration

```swift
init(url URL: URL, name: String?)
```

## Parameters

- **URL**: The URL from which to load texture data.
- **name**: The [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLNamed/name] property for the new texture object.

## Return Value

A new URL-backed texture.

## Discussion

This initializer does not load texel data from the URL; the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLURLTexture] class automatically loads data and caches it for reuse when you use one of the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTexture] methods listed in Accessing Texture Data.
